title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Patanjali Ayurved - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Patanjali Ayurved - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Patanjali Ayurved has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Patanjali Ayurved:
Patanjali Ayurved is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved!
